children.name:
Message: unexpected HTTP error: 500 Internal Server Error, {"status":"fail","message":"Hot restart backup failed for [10.244.1.42]:5701 because a backup request from [10.244.1.44]:5701 is in progress"}
Expected
    <v1alpha1.HotBackupState>: Failure
not to equal
    <v1alpha1.HotBackupState>: Failure
[It] Hazelcast CR with Persistence feature enabled should successfully restart from HotBackup data with HostPath configuration single node [hz_persistence, slow]
